title: ctenopteris matthewiana
intro: Ctenopteris matthewiana, also known as the Matthew's fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ctenopteris matthewiana include its ability to soothe and protect the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. Traditionally, the plant was used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
